canonical_identity: fixed-budget adaptive test-time compute allocation for LLM reasoning centered on which active branch should receive the next unit of compute
strong_points: strong documentation of the current bottleneck
remaining_risks: many bounded hard-case passes that are easy to overread as settled
no single robust universally winning learned allocator yet
possible accidental drift into old-track framing if canonical docs are skipped
current_repo_interpretation: The repository is a strong research platform for fixed-budget branch allocation in LLM reasoning. The main remaining challenge is improving supervision semantics and selective ambiguity handling for hard branch comparisons.
recommended_next_polish_step: Continue adding compact continuation-oriented audit notes and summary artifacts after bounded method passes rather than attempting a major structural reorganization.
